name: I-SALT Triage (Hlungisa, Vavanya, amaNgenelelo asindisa ubomi, unyango/uthutho)
description: Iprothokholi yovavanyo lwexhoba lobuninzi. Umgangatho weziganeko ezininzi zokwenzakala emkhosini kunye nabahlali.
instructions: Inyathelo 1: Ukuhlela kwihlabathi (ukuhamba, ukuwangawangisa, ukushukuma). Inyathelo lesi-2: Vavanya ngokolandelelwano oluphambili. Inyathelo lesi-3: Yenza ungenelelo olusindisa ubomi (ukulawula ukopha okukhulu, indlela yomoya evulekileyo, ukuxinzelelwa kweenaliti, izitofu ezizenzekelayo). Inyathelo lesi-4: Yabela udidi.

categories.label: | Olindelweyo/Oswelekileyo
categories.description: Akunakwenzeka ukuba uphile xa unikwa izixhobo ezikhoyo, okanye uswelekileyo oqinisekisiweyo

categories.label: Ngokukhawuleza (T1)
categories.description: Ukwenzakala okusongela ubomi, kuya kusinda ngokungenelela kwangoko

categories.label: Ilibazisekile (T2)
categories.description: Ukwenzakala okumandundu kodwa okuzinzileyo, kunokulinda ukhathalelo

categories.label: Olindelekileyo
categories.description: Ukwenzakala okungenakukhuseleka kunikwe izixhobo zangoku -- ukhathalelo lwentuthuzelo kuphela

pediatric.note: I-JumpSTART triage algorithm iguqula i-SALT kwizigulana zabantwana. Imilinganiselo yesantya sokuphefumla kunye namanyathelo ovavanyo ayahluka kubantwana abangaphantsi kwesi-8.

source: SALT Mass Casualty Triage (CDC/CHEMPACK), JTS CPG
